title: Blooven Large Tablecloth Clips 4 Pack Stainless Steel Table Cover Clamps Table Cloth Holderss, for Tables of 3-5 cm Thick (Large x 4 Pack)
features: Designed to fit tabletops of 3-5 cm thick. Please measure the thickness of the table and select the suitable size before purchasing. Great for thick tables. Come with 4 pack table cloth clamps which are great to clip your cloth to the table and your glasses, plates and delicious dishes will stay safe and steady. The pack includes 8 tablecloth holders, each measuring 7.5 x 7 cm
Made of stainless steel, which resists rust (great for outdoor dining), and is very hard-wearing (ideal for commercial use, too)

Please note: Stainless steel is armed with built-in corrosion resistance but it can and will rust in certain conditions—although not as quickly or severely as conventional steels. Stainless steels corrode when exposed to damaging chemicals, saline, grease, moisture, or heat for prolonged periods of time. Please clean the tablecloth clips promptly and dry them with a soft cloth, if they are exposed to toxic liquid.

Use them at busy parties to keep your buffet spread in good shape, or keep things formal. The simple design is smart and simple. The table clamps are suitable for home, outside parties, picnics, restaurant, weddings, buffets, dinners, camping
The tablecloth clips are easy to install and take off. Slide them on and these clips will self adjust to hold tablecloths tightly in place.
description: Product Description Blooven Tablecloth Clips (Large x 4 Pieces) Designed to fit tabletops of 3-5 cm thick ATTENTION: Stainless steel is armed with built-in corrosion resistance but it can and will rust in certain conditions —although not as quickly or severely as conventional steels. Stainless steels corrode when exposed to damaging chemicals, saline, grease, moisture, or heat for prolonged periods of time. Please clean the tablecloth clips promptly and dry them with a soft cloth, if they are exposed to the liquid. Wave goodbye to windswept tablecloths and secure your outdoor lunch or BBQ with Blooven self-adjusting table clips. Don't let the weather cause chaos. Clip your cloth to the table and your glasses, plates and delicious dishes will stay safe and steady. Suitable for table thicknesses between 3-5 cm Product Details: Size: 7.5 x 7cm Material: Stainless Steel Color: Silver Package includes 4 x large tablecloth clips Come with 4 pack table cloth clamps which are great to clip your cloth to the table and your glasses, plates and delicious dishes will stay safe and steady. These clips are more than hard-wearing enough for regular use too. Manufactured from quality stainless steel, Blooven tablecloth clips won’t bend out of shape easily or break after exposure to the sun. Smart and Simple Design Work great to keep your buffet spread in good shape, or keep things formal. The design is smart and simple. The table clamps are suitable for home, outside parties, picnics, restaurants, weddings, buffets, dinners, camping. Easy to install and take off. Use with tables of 3-5 cm thick Recommended for tables with a thickness of 3-5 cm . The clip may not hold the table firmly if it is too thin. Please measure the thickness of your table before purchasing. Q&A -Are they easy to use? The clips are exceptionally easy to use, just slide on the table edge.
